caption: A man is seated in a room decorated with framed photographs on the wall and a white mannequin wearing a white garment in the background. He wears a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with white text that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT". A professional black microphone is positioned directly in front of him. The man is speaking and gesturing with his hands, moving from a focused expression to a slight smile as the sequence progresses. In the bottom left and right corners of the scene, there are logos, including one that says "BOSSY" in red text. Clothing racks are partially visible behind the man. Between the frames, the man shifts his head position and continues talking, with his hand gestures moving closer to the microphone.
